content.text: Only a handful of U.S. SMR and advanced-reactor projects are under nuclear construction as of mid-2026; most named projects remain pre-FID with strong federal backing. TerraPower's Natrium plant and Kairos Power's Hermes reactors are the clearest examples of projects that have crossed into active build-out, while Holtec's SMR-300 and TVA's Clinch River BWRX-300 remain pre-FID pending construction-permit review.

annotations.title: $900 Million Available to Unlock Commercial Deployment of American-Made SMRs
TerraPower Commences Construction on America's First Utility-Scale Advanced Nuclear Power Plant
Kairos Power Breaks Ground on Hermes 2 Demonstration Plant
